title: The Complete Instagram Seller Guide: Grow Your Business Safely in 2026
subtitle: From building trust to getting paid — everything an Instagram seller needs to know
metaDescription: Complete guide for Instagram sellers in India 2026. Learn setup, payment protection, delivery best practices and how to scale safely using EscaraPay.

content.text: Instagram has become India's #1 social selling platform. From handmade jewellery to ethnic wear, electronics to home decor — millions of sellers are building profitable businesses. But without proper systems, it can quickly become chaotic and risky. This guide covers everything you need.

content.caption: Instagram has become India's premier social commerce platform

items.title: Switch to a Business Account
items.desc: Get access to analytics, contact buttons, and Instagram Shopping features.

items.title: Perfect Your Bio
items.desc: Include what you sell, your location, delivery info, and your EscaraPay link.

items.title: Use Story Highlights
items.desc: Create highlights for Products, Reviews, How to Order, and FAQs.

items.title: Post Consistently
items.desc: 3-4 posts per week minimum. Use Reels for maximum organic reach.

content.caption: Professional product photography dramatically increases sales

content.text: The biggest mistake Instagram sellers make is accepting direct UPI payments without any protection. This leaves both buyer and seller vulnerable. EscaraPay solves this — create an order in 2 minutes, share the payment link on WhatsApp or Instagram DM, and the buyer pays a protected token. You dispatch once the token is secured. Simple, safe, professional.
⭐ Top sellers on Instagram report 40% fewer payment disputes after switching to EscaraPay's payment protection system.

items: Always get a tracking number — use Delhivery, Shiprocket, or DTDC
Pack products with visible invoice and your business name
Send the EscaraPay confirmation link along with the tracking number
Photograph the packed product before shipping
Follow up with the buyer once the courier marks delivery

content.caption: Professional packaging builds buyer trust and reduces return rates

content.text: Once you have consistent orders, focus on reviews. Ask every happy buyer to send a review screenshot for your Story Highlights. Use EscaraPay's order history to track your GMV and commission data. Set targets — 10 orders/month, then 50, then 100. With proper payment protection, you can confidently take orders from strangers nationwide.
